name: Mangalyaan (MOM)
tagline: First Asian Mars mission; first successful try
description: India’s first interplanetary mission and the first successful Mars mission by an Asian space agency. Delivered an orbiter to Mars on its first attempt — a feat no other space-faring nation managed. Operated for nearly eight years before contact was lost in 2022.
best_known_for: First Asian Mars mission; first successful try
